current.headline: Precision Matching for Modern Healthcare
current.subhead: Two-sided healthcare staffing platform — clinicians (NP/PA/MD/DO/CRNA/PT/OT/SLP) matched to facility jobs by a credential-aware, rule-based match score.
current.source: businesses/alignmd/ops/build.json (no CONSTITUTION.md present — voice derived from build.json + admin pages).

voice_notes: Concrete on the role types (NP/PA/MD/DO/CRNA/PT/OT/SLP) and compact-license logic.
No staffing-agency cliches ('top talent', 'we care about you').
Leads with rules + verification, not vibes.

headline_variants.headline: Credentialed clinicians, matched to the role on day one.
headline_variants.rationale: Replaces the soft 'precision matching' with two concrete promises: credentialing + day-one fit.

headline_variants.headline: Match scoring that reads the license, not just the resume.
headline_variants.rationale: Foregrounds the credential-aware ranking engine — AlignMD's actual moat.

headline_variants.headline: Faster healthcare staffing, without skipping a credential check.
headline_variants.rationale: Names the trade-off the category usually fudges and resolves it. Two-clause structure for skimmers.

subhead_variants.subhead: AlignMD ranks every NP, PA, MD, DO, CRNA, PT, OT, and SLP against your facility's role with a transparent, credential-aware match score — and tracks every license, expiration, and compact-state allowance under it.
subhead_variants.rationale: Keeps the full role list from the current line, adds the expiration + compact tracking (a real differentiator).

subhead_variants.subhead: A two-sided staffing platform built around the credentials, not around the click. Facilities post the role, AlignMD ranks the candidates, and the licensure rules are checked before the submission ever lands.
subhead_variants.rationale: Anti-position opener, then a clean three-step flow. Cleaner for a hero subhead than the current line.

subhead_variants.subhead: Open roles get a ranked, credential-checked shortlist within minutes. AlignMD knows the difference between NP and PA, between compact and single-state, and between today's license and the one that expires next month.
subhead_variants.rationale: Leads with the operator outcome, then uses three concrete distinctions to prove the rule-engine claim.
